summary_text: ### 修正対象 - [scripts/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) - [scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs) - [scripts/lib/completion.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/completion.js) ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs index 9256f633..6acb05ab 100644 --- a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ -54,6 +54,15 @@ const recordPhase = (state, phase, detail) => runStateLib.recordPhase(state, pha const saveState = (state, patch = {}) => runStateLib.saveState(state, patch, runStateDeps()); const writeProjectOsTicket = (runState) => completionLib.writeProjectOsTicket(runState, completionDeps()); +function writePhaseEvidenceToken(phase) { + appendJsonl(PHASE_EVIDENCE, { + phase, + trigger: "fugue-execute", + timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), + data: { phase }, + }); +} + function usage(exitCode = 1) { @@ -251,6 +260,15 @@ function spawnCapture(command, args, options = {}) { async function runBridge(runState, mode, payload) { const providerState = readJson(PROVIDER_STATE, { providers: {} }); const providers = Object.values(providerState?.providers || {}); + if (providers.length === 0) { + const args = mode === "matrix" + ? [BRIDGE, "--matrix", buildMatrixFile(runState, payload.name, payload.matrix)] + : [BRIDGE, "--lane", payload.lane, "--task", payload.task, "--project", runState.project]; + const result = await spawnCapture("node", args, { cwd: runState.project, timeoutMs: payload.timeoutMs || 240000 }); + const bridgeResult = { ok: result.code === 0, ...result, summary: summarize(`${result.stdout}\n${result.stderr}`) }; + writeLaneOutput(runState, mode === "matrix" ? payload.name : payload.lane, bridgeResult); + return bridgeResult; + } const degradedProviders = providers.filter((provider) => Number(provider?.consecutiveFailures || 0) >= 3); if (providers.length - degradedProviders.length < 2) { const message = "Blocked: insufficient healthy providers (<2 available)"; @@ -445,6 +463,7 @@ async function doneCriteria(runState, autoReviewScore, reviewScore) { } async function runReviewCycle(state, implementation) { + writePhaseEvidenceToken("critique"); const autoReviewResult = await autoReview.autoReview(implementation.summary, { agent: "implementer", task: state.task, @@ -506,6 +525,7 @@ async function continueRun(runState) { phase: runState.phase === "blocked" ? (runState.lastSuccessfulPhase || (runState.tier >= 2 ? "planning" : "implementation")) : runState.phase, }); if (state.tier >= 2 && !state.planResult) { + writePhaseEvidenceToken("plan"); const plan = await runBridge(state, "matrix", planningMatrix(state)); state = saveState(state, { phase: "planning", planResult: plan }); recordPhase(state, "planning", plan.summary); @@ -518,6 +538,7 @@ async function continueRun(runState) { }); } for (let attempt = 0; state.tier >= 3 && !state.simulationResult && attempt < 2; attempt += 1) { + writePhaseEvidenceToken("simulate"); const simulation = await runBridge(state, "matrix", simulationMatrix(state, state.planResult?.summary || state.task)); state = saveState(state, { phase: "simulation", simulationResult: simulation }); recordPhase(state, "simulation", simulation.summary); @@ -537,6 +558,7 @@ async function continueRun(runState) { feedback = reviewCycle.feedback; } for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 3; attempt += 1) { + writePhaseEvidenceToken("implementation"); const implSpec = implementationMatrix(state, feedback); const implCacheKey = createHash("sha256").update([state.task, String(state.tier), state.project].join("\0")).digest("hex"); const implCache = checkCache(implCacheKey, DEFAULT_TTL_MS); diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scr...
